title: 2026-01-22 TACO Pressure Index Update: Low at 21.23
description: Fresh macro pressure read for 2026-01-22: the TACO Pressure Index closed at 21.23/100, signaling a low pressure regime as front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations shaped the daily read. See the chart pack, score regime, and what drove the latest reading.
hero_summary: It is not a forecast of policy decisions; it is a structured way to monitor pressure building across markets. On 2026-01-22, the score printed 21.23/100 in the low regime, with front-end rate pressure and inflation expectations doing most of the work.
